channel.title: GitHub Unknown languages Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Unknown languages in GitHub

item.title: GitHubDaily/GitHubDaily
item.description: 坚持分享 GitHub 上高质量、有趣实用的开源技术教程、开发者工具、编程网站、技术资讯。A list cool, interesting projects of GitHub.

item.title: deepseek-ai/awesome-deepseek-integration
item.description: Integrate the DeepSeek API into popular softwares

item.title: rothgar/awesome-tuis
item.description: List of projects that provide terminal user interfaces

item.title: steven2358/awesome-generative-ai
item.description: A curated list of modern Generative Artificial Intelligence projects and services

item.title: Arudjreis/awesome-security-GRC
item.description: Curated list of resources for security Governance, Risk Management, Compliance and Audit professionals and enthusiasts (if they exist).
